AI-Guided Legacy Preservation

Your Story,
Their Legacy.

Preserve your life moments, final wishes, and heartfelt messages in a secure digital space designed for the people you love.

Start Your Journey
Process

How It Works

A simple, compassionate three-step journey to securing your digital and emotional legacy.

01

1. Capture Your Story

Use our AI-guided prompts to record your life moments, final wishes, and heartfelt messages in various formats.

02

2. Securely Encrypt

Your data is protected with military-grade AES-256 encryption. Only you decide who gets access and when.

03

3. Peaceful Delivery

At the designated time, your messages and wishes are gently delivered to your loved ones, exactly as you intended.

Our Mission

Meaningful and
Emotionally Resonant

This digital solution seeks to gently address sensitive moments by providing a compassionate space for individuals to preserve their memories, communicate their values, and thoughtfully express their final wishes.

Preserve Memories

Individuals of all ages can reflect on and record their life journey in a user-friendly environment.

Family Values

Thoughtfully pass down your core values and beliefs to future generations effectively.

Thoughtful Messages

Express final wishes and heartfelt messages to loved ones with compassion and care.

Peace of Mind

Ensure your survivors are supported and guided during difficult transitions.

"Words left unsaid are burdens families carry forever."

Our platform ensures your voice is heard even when you are gone.

Core Principles

Designed for Trust

The foundation of 'If' is built on unshakeable security and deep human empathy.

Military-Grade Security

Your data is encrypted using AES-256 standards, ensuring that only you and your chosen recipients can ever access it.

Zero-Knowledge Privacy

We never have access to your private keys or the content of your messages. Your privacy is absolute and mathematically guaranteed.

The Heartbeat System

Our proprietary check-in system ensures your legacy is delivered only when it's truly time, with multiple layers of verification.

Instant Verification

Fast, reliable processing of your check-ins and legacy triggers, handled by our globally distributed secure network.

Compassionate Support

Designed with empathy to help your loved ones navigate difficult moments with clear guidance and your personal touch.

Perpetual Storage

Your memories are stored across redundant, secure cloud nodes, ensuring they stay safe and accessible for decades to come.

A Life, Categorized

The Modular
Legacy Framework

"If" provides 18+ structured categories to ensure no part of your story is left untold, from career to spirituality.

About Me

Personal reflections and introductions.

My Life

Major life events, milestones, and memories.

Work Life

Professional history and career reflections.

My Spouse

Details and stories about your significant other.

Children

Reflections on children and family connections.

Friends

Memorable experiences with lifelong friends.

Pets

Cherished memories of beloved animal companions.

Favorites

Books, music, films, and personal preferences.

Spiritual Beliefs

Religious or spiritual insights and reflections.

Family Tree

Visual map of heritage and ancestors.

Passing Away

End-of-life preferences and burial wishes.

Living Will

Medical treatment and DNR preferences.

Journals

Personal letters and ongoing reflections.

Media Archive

Photos, audio, and videos for loved ones.

And Many More...
Safe & Sound

Your Legacy Deserves
Military-Grade Security

Trust is the foundation of our platform. We combine cutting-edge technology with rigorous security protocols to ensure your story remains yours alone until the right moment.

AES-256 Encryption

The same encryption standard used by banks and governments globally to protect sensitive data.

Private Key Ownership

You are the sole holder of access. Not even our team can view your private messages without authorization.

Zero-Knowledge Architecture

We prioritize your privacy by ensuring your data is encrypted before it even leaves your device.

Redundancy & Backups

Distributed storage ensures your legacy is never lost to hardware failure or localized disasters.

Encrypted by Default

Every byte of data you upload is immediately processed through our zero-knowledge encryption pipeline.

AES-256
ZERO-KNOWLEDGE
Legacy Media

Beyond Written
Words

Capture your voice, your expressions, and your smiles. We support high-fidelity media storage so your presence remains palpable.

  • Photo Galleries

    High-resolution storage for every milestone.

  • Voice Notes

    Personal audio reflections that carry your voice.

  • Video Messages

    Heartfelt messages for future milestones.

Play Preview

"The video my grandfather left for my 18th birthday changed everything for me."

Customer Story
Membership

Choose Your Legacy

Select the plan that best fits the depth of the story you wish to preserve for future generations.

Free

$0/forever
  • Basic storytelling prompts
  • Up to 500MB storage
  • 1 Legacy Contact
  • Standard encryption
Choose Free

Yearly

$49/per year
  • Advanced AI recommendations
  • 10GB Secure storage
  • 5 Legacy Contacts
  • Speech-to-Text conversion
  • Multimedia support
Choose Yearly

Lifetime

$199/one-time
  • Everything in Yearly
  • Unlimited storage
  • Unlimited Legacy Contacts
  • High-fidelity video storage
  • Priority support
Choose Lifetime
Information

Questions & Answers

Finding peace of mind starts with clear answers to sensitive questions.

We use a 'Heartbeat' system where you periodically check in. If we don't hear from you after a pre-set duration and multiple attempts, your designated trustees are contacted for verification.
Absolutely. You have full control and can edit, update, or delete your content at any time. Think of it as a living legacy that grows with you.
Only the individuals you specifically designate (Trustees) can initiate the access process. Even then, they only see what you have explicitly shared with them.
Yes. We use industry-standard AES-256 encryption. Your data is encrypted locally before being stored in our distributed secure cloud, making it unreadable without your private key.
We have a 'Perpetual Archive' trust designed to keep the service running and data accessible for at least 50 years, regardless of our corporate status.

Start Building
Your Legacy Today

Join thousands of individuals who are securing their life stories and providing peace for their families with "If".
